name: Say Cheese
short_description: Hunger speaks louder! Help our rodent hero find his way to the cheese in a maze full of challenges
detailed_description:
Dive into a world of cheese and challenges! Help a cunning mouse escape an elaborate maze filled with secret passages, dangerous traps and intriguing puzzles. Each level is a new challenge, requiring you to use your wits to guide the rodent to the delicious prize: an irresistible piece of cheese. Explore different environments, from ancient forests to entire worlds made of cheese, each with its own unique challenges. But be careful! You have a limited number of actions.

Features
♦ 4 Worlds
♦ Well-crafted puzzles
♦ 40 Levels
♦ Varieties of traps
♦ original soundtrack
